name: etoro-api
description: Credential-safe eToro Public API CLI and Codex skill for portfolio, market-data, and approval-gated trading execution.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and prepare eToro trades with a local CLI.
interface.longDescription: A local eToro Public API integration for Codex. It provides a credential-safe CLI for identity, portfolio, PnL, trade history, instrument lookup, prices, candles, snapshots, and approval-gated trading execution while keeping API credentials in local config or environment variables outside model context.
